message.scp_additions.hazmat.remove_armo: Remove all armor before putting on the Hazmat Suit
message.scp_additions.hazmat.sealed_cons: The sealed mask prevents eating or drinking
message.scp_additions.hazmat.equip_hold_: Hold still while putting on the Hazmat Suit
message.scp_additions.hazmat.equip_cance: Putting on the Hazmat Suit was canceled because you moved
message.scp_additions.hazmat.unequip_hol: Hold still while removing the Hazmat Suit
Keep holding Use and remain still to remove the Hazmat Suit
message.scp_additions.hazmat.unequip_can: Removing the Hazmat Suit was canceled because you moved
Removing the Hazmat Suit was canceled because you released Use
message.scp_additions.hazmat.remove_inst: Sneak and hold Use while standing still to remove the Hazmat Suit
message.scp_additions.scp_714.sleepy: Maybe I should take a nap...
tooltip.scp_additions.hazmat_suit.equip: Hold Use while standing still to equip.
tooltip.scp_additions.hazmat_suit.remove: Sneak and hold Use while standing still to remove.
tooltip.scp_additions.keycard_reader_pla: Click the side where the reader should appear
tooltip.scp_additions.keycard_reader_con: Use to configure; crouch to copy; hold Control to apply
tooltip.scp_additions.tesla_gate_primary: Detects nearby entities and releases a lethal electrical discharge while enabled.
tooltip.scp_additions.tesla_gate_seconda: Controlled globally by a Tesla Gate Terminal; requires a clear 3x3 frame area.
tooltip.scp_additions.scp079_relay_prima: Place beside a redstone device to let SCP-079 pulse it while Facility Control is active.
tooltip.scp_additions.scp079_relay_secon: Acts as the legacy fallback for heavy doors without a functional panel or reader.
tooltip.scp_additions.facility_control_p: Power with redstone to grant SCP-079 control of the facility.
tooltip.scp_additions.facility_control_s: The AI may open doors for threats or close an open door ahead of a player.
tooltip.scp_additions.button_functional_: Door control panel. Emits redstone while opening or open.
A manually placed panel on the opposite side can synchronize with it.
tooltip.scp_additions.button_locked_prim: Locked decorative panel. It cannot be activated.
tooltip.scp_additions.button_locked_seco: Does not grant SCP-079 access to a heavy door.
tooltip.scp_additions.heavy_door_primary: Redstone-operated heavy door with a 1.2 second opening cycle.
tooltip.scp_additions.heavy_door_seconda: Accepts power at the base or either upper relay height.
tooltip.scp_additions.tesla_terminal_pri: Controls the global enabled state and manual override of all loaded Tesla Gates.
tooltip.scp_additions.sl1_connected_floo: Connects automatically with the other SL1 Floor Block.
death.attack.scp_additions.scp_714_coma: %1$s entered a coma while wearing SCP-714
